--- !bad_match_bidirectional_full.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
MATCH (a)<-[:Knows]->(b)
RETURN a

--- Error
syntax error: testdata/input/gql/!bad_match_bidirectional_full.sql:2:20: bidirectional edge pattern '<-[]->' is not supported
  2|  MATCH (a)<-[:Knows]->(b)
   |                     ^~


--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.BadGQLLinearQueryStatement{
        BadNode: &ast.BadNode{
          NodePos: 15,
          NodeEnd: 48,
          Tokens:  []*token.Token{
            &token.Token{
              Kind:     "<ident>",
              Space:    "\n",
              Raw:      "MATCH",
              AsString: "MATCH",
              Pos:      15,
              End:      20,
            },
            &token.Token{
              Kind:  "(",
              Space: " ",
              Raw:   "(",
              Pos:   21,
              End:   22,

              Kind:     "<ident>",
              Raw:      "a",
              AsString: "a",
              Pos:      22,
              End:      23,
            },
            &token.Token{
              Kind: ")",
              Raw:  ")",
              Pos:  23,
              End:  24,
            },
            &token.Token{
              Kind: "<",
              Raw:  "<",
              Pos:  24,
              End:  25,
            },
            &token.Token{
              Kind: "-",
              Raw:  "-",
              Pos:  25,
              End:  26,
            },
            &token.Token{
              Kind: "[",
              Raw:  "[",
              Pos:  26,
              End:  27,
            },
            &token.Token{
              Kind: ":",
              Raw:  ":",
              Pos:  27,
              End:  28,

            &token.Token{
              Kind:     "<ident>",
              Raw:      "Knows",
              AsString: "Knows",
              Pos:      28,
              End:      33,

              Kind: "]",
              Raw:  "]",
              Pos:  33,
              End:  34,

              Kind: "->",

              Pos:  34,

              End:  37,

              Kind: ")",

              Pos:  38,
              End:  39,
            },
            &token.Token{
              Kind:     "<ident>",
              Space:    "\n",
              Raw:      "RETURN",
              AsString: "RETURN",
              Pos:      40,
              End:      46,

            &token.Token{
              Kind:     "<ident>",
              Space:    " ",
              Raw:      "a",
              AsString: "a",
              Pos:      47,
              End:      48,
            },
          },
        },
      },

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph MATCH (a)<-[:Knows]->(b) RETURN a
